title: Register for Dreamforce, the Can’t-Miss Event of the Year
author: Shanta Speller

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Still debating whetherDreamforce 2025is worth the trip? Or maybe you need a quick overview to share with your team. Either way, we’ve got you covered with answers to the most common questions so you can decide why Dreamforce is the right event for you.

raw_html:
Still debating whether Dreamforce 2025 is worth the trip? Or maybe you need a quick overview to share with your team. Either way, we’ve got you covered with answers to the most common questions so you can decide why Dreamforce is the right event for you.

Everything you need to know about Dreamforce 2025

When is it?

Dreamforce takes place October 14-16, 2025, at the Moscone Center in San Francisco. The full schedule extends across three days with 1,500+ expert-led sessions, 115+ visionary speakers, one unforgettable Dreamfest concert, and countless immersive experiences throughout the city.

Where is it?

Dreamforce fills downtown San Francisco with tens of thousands of Trailblazers from around the world. The Moscone Center is the heart of the action, filled with expert-led learning, the latest product demos, hands-on trainings, 1-to-1 consultations, and more.

What is Dreamforce?

The world’s largest, most trusted technology event. Dreamforce brings together innovators, leaders, and visionaries from every industry. Learn more about the event and who should attend.

Your guide starts here

Who is Dreamforce for?

The short answer: everyone. Dreamforce 2025 is packed with can’t-miss learning for anyone no matter your role, level, or industry. You’ll find: 

  • Role-based content for sales, marketing, service, commerce, IT, development, architecture, and partners
  • Industry-specific sessions for financial services, health care and life sciences, technology, retail, manufacturing, automotive, consumer goods, and more
  • Sessions for every stage of your career, from beginners building new skills and subject matter experts, to global executives driving strategy at scale

Wherever you are in your journey, you’ll find content and connections that move you forward.

What can I expect?

Dreamforce 2025 is built to inspire, teach, and connect. You’ll get hands-on with the latest innovations, hear how leading companies are reimagining business with agentic AI, real-time data and CRM, and walk away with strategies you can use immediately. You’ll experience:

  • 1,500+ sessions, workshops, and trainings filled with practical skills and real-world takeaways
  • Customer success stories that highlight how AI, data, and CRM are driving transformation
  • Hundreds of visionaries and thought leaders shaping what’s next 
  • A keynote from Salesforce CEO, Chair and Co-Founder Marc Benioff showcasing Salesforce’s mission, the newest innovations, and real customer success

You’ll leave Dreamforce with new skills, fresh perspectives, and the inspiration to create real change in your own work.

What does the Salesforce+ experience look like?

Salesforce+ is your free, virtual front-row seat to Dreamforce 2025. Watch keynotes and product announcements as they happen live, then explore exclusive sessions designed to help you learn and reimagine what’s possible. With Salesforce+ you’ll get:

  • 72-hours of programming broadcast globally
  • 450+ inspiring sessions live and on-demand
  • Stream all the breakthrough product launches
  • Exclusive interviews and behind-the-scenes moments

Whether you’re attending virtually or in person, registering for Salesforce+ ensures you have access to all the content during Dreamforce and long after the event wraps.

Isn’t this just another tech conference?

Not even close. Dreamforce is where innovation meets inspiration. Yes, you’ll see the latest AI and CRM breakthroughs. But you’ll also:

  • Explore strategies that drive measurable growth
  • Discover how humans and AI agents work together to drive customer success
  • Connect with a global community that believes business is the greatest platform for change

Dreamforce combines learning, networking, and fun with a sense of purpose you won’t find anywhere else.

How do I register?

Register online today to secure your spot for Dreamforce 2025 in San Francisco or to stream Dreamforce free on Salesforce+.

  • Onsite sessions are filling up fast — book early to reserve your seat
  • Online access is completely free and gives you the flexibility to join from anywhere

Don’t wait – Dreamforce 2025 is the AI event of the year, and you don’t want to miss it.

Pro Tip: Share your Dreamforce experience on social using #DF25 and join the global conversation.

The future of business is here

We can’t wait for you to join us at Dreamforce 2025 as we learn, connect, give back, and have fun — together. Get ready, Trailblazers, we’ve got some serious celebrating to do. 

Register now
